metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2872
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.1: "OPHN1-Homer interaction is critical for LTP"
- "Whereas LTP-inducing stimuli produced a robust and long-lasting potentiation in control neurons, only an initial, transient increase in synaptic transmission was observed in simultaneously recorded neurons coexpressing OPHN1#2 shRNA and OPHN1Hom (Fig. 1A)."

Fig.2: "OPHN1-Homer interaction is required for positioning EZ near PSD"
- "Consistent with previous findings (Lu et al., 2007), we observed that in scr#1 shRNA-expressing neurons PSD-95-GFP puncta were nearly always associated with clathrin-DsRed (Fig. 2A). In OPHN1#2 shRNA-expressing neurons, however, we noted a considerable loss of PSD-associated clathrin puncta (Fig. 2A)."

Fig.3: "Disruption of OPHN1-Homer interaction reduces the number of newly exocytosed AMPARs at synaptic sites in basal synaptic conditions"
- "GluA1 exocytosis at synaptic sites was significantly reduced in neurons treated with pep-OPHN1Hom, compared with pep-contHom or no peptide-treated neurons (Fig. 3C,D). "

Fig.4: "OPHN1-Homer interaction is essential for glycine-induced increase in receptor recycling/exocytosis and synaptic AMPAR number"
- "glycine induced a robust increase in the amount of SEP-GluA1 at the spine surface of these neurons (Fig. 4A-C). In contrast, when neurons were pretreated with pep-OPHN1Hom, only a modest increase in synaptic SEP-GluA1 was observed upon glycine stimulation (Fig. 4A-C)...". Experimental description: - "Dissociated hippocampal neurons were prepared from E18 rats"
- Species of over-expressed oligophrenin-1 (OPHN1) is human (traced back to PMID:22017989 ): "The OPHN1-EGFP construct was generated by inserting the human OPHN1 coding sequence into the mammalian expression vector pEGFP-N3 (enhanced GFP, Clontech). "
